summary: Ensures equipment, systems, and infrastructure operate reliably, safely, and efficiently to support continuous flow and CI‑OS performance.
responsibilities: Develop and maintain preventive and predictive maintenance programs
Analyze equipment performance, failure modes, and reliability trends
Collaborate with Process Engineers to ensure equipment supports process capability requirements
Conduct root-cause analysis for equipment failures and chronic issues
Implement reliability-centered maintenance (RCM) and condition-based monitoring strategies
Maintain asset hierarchies, maintenance records, and equipment documentation
Support digital instrumentation of equipment for telemetry and predictive analytics
Coordinate maintenance schedules to minimize downtime and protect flow
Ensure maintenance activities comply with safety, quality, and regulatory standards
Participate in improvement projects involving equipment upgrades or redesign
authorities: Authorize equipment shutdowns for safety or reliability concerns
Escalate systemic equipment risks to leadership
decisionRights: Selection of reliability tools and technologies
kaizenCapabilities: Participation in gemba walks with a reliability focus
cqiCapabilities: Integration of equipment metrics into CQI dashboards

constraints: Maintenance actions must comply with safety and regulatory standards
All changes must be logged and version-controlled
